schema_version: 1

nodes:
  - router (llm: anthropic/claude-sonnet-5)
  - search (llm: anthropic/claude-sonnet-5)
      tools: tests.support.tools:echo
  - shout (handler: tests.support.handlers:uppercase_last_message)

edges:
  - START -> router
  - router -[tests.support.routing:by_last_message_content]-> {positive -> search, negative -> shout}
  - search -> shout
  - shout -> END
